nasb.text: The sluggard buries his hand in the dish; He is weary of bringing it to his mouth again.

esv.text: The sluggard buries his hand in the dish; it wears him out to bring it back to his mouth.

cnv.text: 懶惰人把手放在盤子裡， 連拿食物送回口邊也覺得勞累。

ccb.text: 懒惰人手放在餐盘， 却懒得送食物进嘴。

csbs.text: 懒惰的人手放在盘子里， 连把食物拿回自己口里也嫌麻烦。
